data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any checks or data related to the upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior, which is a critical requirement. The linked use case mentions this behavior, but the prior steps do not demonstrate any API interactions or state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to validate the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for upgrade/downgrade behavior
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior.
